set_fields.acceptance_criteria: Shared loop engine is in use by both Ralph and autoresearch, canonical runtime storage lives under .pi/loops/**, autoresearch is task-scoped and phase-based with controller-owned child sessions, autoresearch_run/autoresearch_done replace the old tool trio, isolated VCS handling protects the main workspace, legacy handling is explicit rather than fallback-driven, and extensions/tau gate passes.
